V-M-037.checks: Admin frontend must become compact and usable from a phone for operational status, user search, devices, payments, and system health.
V-M-037.commands: cd frontend-admin && npm run build; mobile admin viewport smoke review

module-checks.check-2: Mobile overview surfaces service health and urgent counts without desktop-only tables.
module-checks.check-3: Device block, unblock, rotate, and revoke are reachable and require confirmation.
module-checks.check-4: Audit-sensitive admin actions preserve current backend audit expectations.

scenarios.scenario-1: Admin can inspect system state and manage a device from a phone without switching to desktop layout.
scenarios.scenario-2: Critical device actions are hidden in a wide table or unavailable on mobile.
scenarios.scenario-3: An admin action lacks confirmation or loses audit visibility.
